commit.message:
[renovate] Bootstrap node for Gitea validate workflow

Purpose: Restore the hosted validate lane on the pinned Python runner after the live replay showed JavaScript actions fail without a node runtime inside the job container.
Scope: Update the validate workflow and its workflow contract tests.
Status: Focused workflow tests pass locally; the rebased branch is ready for another hosted push replay.
Next: Push the refreshed branch to private Gitea, verify the push-triggered validate and release-bundle runs, then rerun Renovate end to end.
See also: ADR 0297
